description: Enterprise employee record with full lifecycle management.
semantic_description: An employee within the organization, tracking personal information, employment details, department assignment, position, and status through a full employment lifecycle.
lifecycle_description: PROBATION → active → ON_LEAVE (↔ active) → RESIGNED / TERMINATED

semantic_description: An organizational unit representing a department or division. Supports parent-child hierarchy for org chart construction.

description: Job position definition within the organization.
semantic_description: A defined job position within a department, specifying title, grade level, and salary range.

description: Daily attendance record for clock-in and clock-out tracking.
semantic_description: A daily attendance entry for an employee capturing check-in/check-out times, overtime hours, and attendance classification.

description: Leave request with multi-level approval workflow.
semantic_description: A formal leave request submitted by an employee, specifying leave type, duration, and reason. Follows approval workflow from submission through manager review.
lifecycle_description: draft → pending → approved / rejected; pending → cancelled

description: Monthly payroll record for each employee.
semantic_description: A monthly payroll entry for an employee, capturing base salary, allowances, deductions, overtime pay, and net pay. Follows a processing workflow from draft through approval to payment.
